events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: American singer, actress, and dancer Jennifer Lopez was born on this day in 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: From the block to the top, J.Lo has been serving hits and style for decades.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking stages worldwide, the iconic Mick Jagger proves age is just a number.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched in the United States on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: MTV's Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, a channel changed music forever. Remember the first video ever played on MTV?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was originally released in the UK on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe
angles.copy: It's almost 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe', an album that defined a generation.

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The legend of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: The King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. His music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, tragically succumbing to his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: Three decades ago, the music world lost a profound voice. Tupac's impact is still felt today.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix tragically passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi's Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar innovator. Jimi Hendrix's sound remains timeless.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was first released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legend
angles.copy: That legendary zebra crossing. It's almost 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The dynamic frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the trailblazing Chrissie Hynde. Still rocking with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in 1972.

angles.name: Liam's Birthday
angles.copy: Biblical! The one and only Liam Gallagher celebrates his birthday today. Still sounding absolutely mega.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was originally released on his album of the same name on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: More than five decades on, 'Imagine' still resonates as a powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: The first iPod released in 2001
events.blurb: Apple officially unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember when your entire music library fit in your pocket? The iPod changed everything, 25 years ago.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred. It's James Bond Day, celebrating the enduring legacy of 007.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary musician and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision for peace lives on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Celebrated English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: From Python to Fawlty, the brilliant John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released in the UK on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their eclectic masterpiece, 'The White Album'.
